description_long: This object is a piece of sushi, specifically a salmon nigiri, featuring a slice of orange-pink salmon draped over a compact mound of white rice. The salmon has a glossy, slightly translucent appearance with visible marbling and subtle striations, indicating its freshness and fatty content. The rice beneath is tightly packed, with individual grains discernible along the sides, and forms a slightly rounded rectangular base. The overall shape is elongated and gently curved, with the salmon slice neatly conforming to the rice mound. There are no visible garnishes, sauces, or additional toppings present on the sushi. The object is unadorned and not accompanied by any packaging or serving vessel, appearing as a standalone piece.
description: A piece of salmon nigiri sushi with glossy orange-pink salmon atop a compact mound of white rice, unadorned and without packaging.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered salmon slice on top of the rice mound, with visible grain texture and a gentle curve.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the salmon slice and the compact, rounded end of the rice base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the salmon's marbling and the rice's texture.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tapered end of the salmon and the rice, with less visible grain detail.
